ما هي خدمات المكتب الاستشاري؟ كم أتعابه؟: What are a consulting office's services? What are its fees? What's the difference between it and a contractor? And how to choose the right one for your project — from 22 years of experience in Cairo
ما هو مكتب الاستشارات الهندسية؟: What is an engineering consultancy office?
مكتب الاستشارات الهندسية جهة مهنية معتمد: An engineering consultancy office is an accredited professional body that handles the intellectual and supervisory side of the project: studies, architectural, structural, and electromechanical design, preparing shop drawings, and supervising execution and reviewing contractors' work. In short, it is who turns your idea into buildable plans, then monitors their execution to match the design and specifications.
خدمات المكتب الاستشاري الأساسية: Core services of the consulting office
المساقط، الواجهات، الكتلة، والتصور ثلاثي: Floor plans, façades, massing, 3D visualization, and VR tours
حسابات وتصميم الخرسانة والحديد لضمان الأ: Calculations and design of concrete and steel to ensure safety and efficiency
توزيع المساحات، الخامات، الإضاءة، والأثا: Space planning, materials, lighting, and furniture
مخططات تفصيلية معتمدة للتنفيذ واستخراج ا: Certified detailed plans for execution and obtaining permits
متابعة ميدانية ومراجعة جودة التنفيذ ومطا: On-site follow-up and review of execution quality and its conformity to the design
الفرق بين المكتب الاستشاري والمقاول: The difference between the consulting office and the contractor
نسبة من قيمة المشروع: A percentage of the project value
6 معايير لاختيار مكتب استشارات هندسية مو: 6 criteria for choosing a trustworthy engineering consultancy office
